faqs.question: Tell me about Luca?
faqs.answer:
Luca Nguyen (LucaN) is a fresher fullstack web developer living at the intersection of frontend and backend with TypeScript — crafting clean, scalable React interfaces and reliable Node.js APIs.

His core stack: Next.js, React, NestJS, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Tailwind CSS, and Zustand. He writes strictly typed, modular code and cares deeply about clean architecture.

Off the keyboard: he's into coffee, guitar, and constantly exploring new technologies. You can find his work on GitHub at github.com/smoluca123.

faqs.question: What projects has Luca built?
faqs.answer:
Here are some highlights from Luca's project work:

1. Disconnected — A fullstack social networking platform with auth, posts, follows, and comments (Next.js, NestJS, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Prisma).
2. E-commerce Platform — Full-featured store with cart, orders, and admin dashboard (Next.js, NestJS, TypeScript, Prisma).
3. Portfolio IDE — This very site! A VS Code-inspired portfolio with file explorer, terminal, and AI copilot (Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Zustand).
4. Discord Bot — Feature-rich bot with moderation, music, and utilities (Node.js, TypeScript, Discord.js).
5. Design System UI Library — Reusable component library built on Shadcn/ui with TypeScript support.

Open the projects.js tab to dig into the details.

faqs.question: Tell me about his work experience
faqs.answer:
Luca is currently a Fresher Fullstack Web Developer focused on building and shipping fullstack web applications using his core stack of Next.js, NestJS, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL.

He has been working on personal, freelance, and open-source projects since 2024, with all his work available on GitHub at github.com/smoluca123.

Check experience.ts for the full timeline.

faqs.question: What's his tech stack?
faqs.answer:
Luca's primary stack:

Languages & Markup: TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3
Frontend: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn/ui, Zustand, Redux, React Query, Styled Components
Backend: Node.js, Express.js, NestJS, Prisma ORM
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL
Hosting & Cloud: Vercel, Render, Clever Cloud, AWS
Tools: Git, NPM, Prettier, VS Code

Open skills.json for the full breakdown with proficiency levels.

faqs.question: How can I contact Luca?
faqs.answer:
Easiest ways to reach Luca:

• Email: icaluca12@gmail.com
• GitHub: github.com/smoluca123
• Facebook: facebook.com/LucaNN.Info
• Website: paindev.net

He typically responds within 24 hours. The contact.css tab has a form too if you'd rather drop a message there.

faqs.question: How can I support Luca?
faqs.answer:
Sweet of you to ask. A few easy ways to support Luca:

• ⭐ Star his projects on GitHub (github.com/smoluca123).
• 🔁 Share his work with folks who'd find it useful.
• 💬 Connect on Facebook and engage with his posts.
• 💼 Refer him for interesting frontend / backend / fullstack roles.
• ☕ Buy him a coffee — he runs on it.

Genuine feedback on his projects is always welcome.
